title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY - 211info
text: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about affordable housing. Administers Section 8/Housing Choice Vouchers and public housing, in addition to fielding complaints about those programs. 1039 NW Nye Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Varies by program. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 265-5326 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (541) 265-5326 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Each program has its own application process. Applicants may apply for more than one type of housing assistance and be on several waitlists at the same time. FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Lincoln County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located 2 blocks west of Highway 101, between NW 10th and 11th Streets Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Public Housing Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY
